case_title: RINALDI, MARIA DOLORES VS CASTRO, ADRIAN SFPD #845 et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SFPD

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RINALDI, MARIA DOLORES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CASTRO, ADRIAN  SFPD  #845 MEDINA, ALEXANDRA  SFPD  #1569 COLLA, JOHN SFPD #324 EVANS, JOHN  SFPD  #1820 SUHR, GREGORY   SFPD   #887 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFPD DEFENDANTS MEDINA, ALEXANDRA-WAIVED SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RINALDI, MARIA DOLORES AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ADRIAN  SFPD  #845 MEDINA, ALEXANDRA  SFPD  #1569 COLLA, JOHN SFPD #324 EVANS, JOHN  SFPD  #1820 SUHR, GREGORY   SFPD   #887 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFPD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERMENT AGENCY.
